Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Enforce]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Enforce is a technique Yerin can use with her madra.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Enforce is a technique used to reinforce the body with madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The servants' shouts were Enforced, causing the nearby sand to shake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon used his madra to Enforce his body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon used his Enforcer technique on his arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Enforce is a technique used to assist breathing.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon must use Enforce to move because his core is nearly empty.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — A man used his Blood Shadow to Enforce himself.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Pride used the Enforce technique to lift a wall.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
